memberdef.argsstring: (const Fluide_Diphasique &two_phase_fluid, const DoubleTab &particles_position, const DoubleTab &particles_velocity, const double &deltat_simu) override
memberdef.name: compute_lagrangian_contact_forces

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &volumic_phase_indicator_function, const Domaine_VF &domain_vf, const IntTab &particles_eulerian_id_number, DoubleTab &contact_force_source_term) override
memberdef.name: discretize_contact_forces_eulerian_field

briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.

detaileddescription.para: Description: This class enables to compute solid-solid interactions for fpi module under the framework of soft-sphere collision model. Under this framework, multiple collisions can occurs at the same time (ie a particle can collide with 2 or more particles). The collision is spread out on multiple time steps. A slight overlap (less than the mesh grid size) occurs during the process.
